title: Taiwan Strait Tensions Escalate: PLA Conducts Largest Military Exercise Since 2023
content: The People's Liberation Army launched large-scale military exercises in the Taiwan Strait involving over 80 aircraft and 20 naval vessels. The exercises include simulated blockade scenarios and live-fire drills. Taiwan's Ministry of National Defense issued a Level-3 alert. Regional markets opened sharply lower with Taiwan Futures Index down 3.8%. USD/TWD surged past 32.5. Technology supply chains face disruption risk as shipping lanes are affected.
author: fixture
